entries.title: gen-image
entries.description: Generate one or more educational/explanatory images from a text prompt via the gen-image CLI and return ready-to-paste image links. For explicit, user-requested generation (single or batch).

entries.title: pact-agents
entries.description: 24 Pact/KDA-CE skills, 16 instructions, 20 slash commands, 1 security agent, and CI scripts for Kadena smart contract development.

entries.title: radiology
entries.description: Medical-imaging tooling references: DICOM via DCMTK, the Orthanc REST API, and 3D Slicer.

entries.title: cursor-acp-bridge
entries.description: MCP server that drives cursor-agent over the Agent Client Protocol (ACP): delegate coding tasks to Cursor from Claude Code, with auto-approved writes and clarifying questions surfaced via elicitation.

entries.title: tidal-diagram-skills
entries.description: Build diagrams in the Tidal Diagrams app from a prompt, and export them to Figma as editable layers.

entries.title: genvid-skills
entries.description: Genvid reference skill pack — teaches any MCP-capable agent to drive the Genvid governed boundary.

entries.title: biookf
entries.description: BioOKF: curate, visualize, and reason over biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles. Bundles the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live BioOKF Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app. The Studio is shipped precompiled; the first run downloads the binaries for your platform from GitHub Releases, so no local compile is required.

entries.title: hamakom-leads
entries.description: המקום לידים — בריף לידים ועורך בוקר ל'המקום הכי חם בגיהנום', ישירות מ-osint-db (חדשות מ-33 מקורות + רשומות ממשלתיות חדשות). מדרג לפי DNA, מחבר חדשות↔דאטה, ומצב פיץ' עומק. האיסוף ב-osint-db (פלאגין hamakom-osint); כאן הבחירה והדירוג.

entries.title: creative-skills
entries.description: Creative skills including SVG animation and design

entries.title: dfos
entries.description: Install, configure, and use the DFOS protocol CLI: identities, content chains, credentials, services, and relays.

entries.title: openair-3-mcp-client-plugin-oss
entries.description: openair MCP harness — manuals, workflow recipes, multi-MCP bridge. Pair with openair-3-mcp-server-oss v0.2+.

entries.title: ivalt-agent-auth
entries.description: Human-in-the-loop biometric approval with PKI-signed attestation. Pauses an agent at a sensitive step, pushes to the approver's phone for FaceID/fingerprint approval, and returns a signed attestation (biometric + location + time + device).

entries.title: kmgraph
entries.description: Structured knowledge capture, lesson-learned documentation, and cross-session memory for Claude Code projects. Includes KG entries, ADRs, meta-issue tracking, chat extraction, and profile-file rule capture.

entries.title: drt-hub
entries.description: Skills for drt — Reverse ETL for the code-first data stack

entries.title: hyperframes
entries.description: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entries.title: biff-dev
entries.description: UNIX-style team communication for Claude Code: /who, /finger, /plan, /write, /read, /mesg, /tty, /last, /wall, /talk

entries.title: loopprint
entries.description: Interactive wizard that turns a vague goal into a runnable loop blueprint — durable state, an external verifier, stop conditions, and maker != checker. Decision gate, pattern library, and a generated, self-linted artifact package.

entries.title: rules-as-tests
entries.description: Rules-as-Tests: turn any codebase convention into an executable test that fails at the earliest reachable channel. Skills, sub-agents, session hooks + an opt-in command to wire git-hook/CI enforcement into your repo.
